decisions.reason: Completes 'each line is a truth...' after the previous segment ends on 'Each'.

Completes Jiang's reading request, 'Ivory, can you read please?' before the quoted passage begins.
Completes 'he chooses to return to Penelope' across the boundary.
Completes 'And then at night, I will just sneak away.'
